today_news.title: ChatGPT now explains math and physics with interactive visualizations
today_news.summary: ChatGPT now displays interactive visualizations for math and physics topics where users can tweak variables and watch graphs update in real time. More than 70 concepts are available at launch.

today_news.title: How Pokémon Go is giving delivery robots an inch-perfect view of the world
today_news.summary: Pokémon Go was the world’s first augmented-reality megahit. Released in 2016 by the Google spinout Niantic, the AR twist on the juggernaut Pokémon franchise fast became a global phenomenon. From Chicago to Oslo to Enoshima, players hit the streets in the urgent hope of catching a Jigglypuff or a Squ...

today_news.title: Nvidia and Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab announce long-term AI partnership
today_news.summary: Nvidia and Thinking Machines Lab, the AI startup founded by former OpenAI executive Mira Murati, are entering a long-term partnership.

today_news.title: The Download: AI’s role in the Iran war, and an escalating legal fight

today_news.title: Prioritizing energy intelligence for sustainable growth
today_news.summary: Loudoun County, Virginia, once known for its pastoral scenery and proximity to Washington, DC, has earned a more modern reputation in recent years: The area has the highest concentration of data centers on the planet. Ten years ago, these facilities powered email and e-commerce. Today, thanks to the...

today_news.title: Amazon gets court order blocking Perplexity's AI shopping agent
today_news.summary: Amazon stops Perplexity's shopping bot by court order: a ruling that could shape the future of AI agents in e-commerce.

today_news.title: German court says "It's AI" isn't enough to void copyright
today_news.summary: A German regional court has ruled that song lyrics written by a human are still protected by copyright, even if the music was made with AI tools like SunoAI. Simply claiming a work is AI-generated isn't enough to strip that protection, you need proof.

today_news.title: Amazon makes senior engineers the human filter for AI-generated code after a series of outages
today_news.summary: Following a series of allegedly AI-caused outages, Amazon is turning its senior engineers into human filters for AI-generated code.

today_tech.title: StuPASE: Towards Low-Hallucination Studio-Quality Generative Speech Enhancement
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Achieving high perceptual quality without hallucination remains a challenge in generative speech enhancement (SE). today_tech.title: Granulon: Awakening Pixel-Level Visual Encoders with Adaptive Multi-Granularity Semantics for MLLM
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Recent advances in multimodal large language models largely rely on CLIP-based visual encoders, which emphasize global semantic alignment but struggle with fine-grained visual understanding. today_tech.title: Trade-offs Between Capacity and Robustness in Neural Audio Codecs for Adversarially Robust Speech Recognition
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Adversarial perturbations exploit vulnerabilities in automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems while preserving human perceived linguistic content. today_tech.title: Emotion-Aware Prefix: Towards Explicit Emotion Control in Voice Conversion Models
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Recent advances in zero-shot voice conversion have exhibited potential in emotion control, yet the performance is suboptimal or inconsistent due to their limited expressive capacity. today_tech.title: Interpretable Markov-Based Spatiotemporal Risk Surfaces for Missing-Child Search Planning with Reinforcement Learning and LLM-Based Quality Assurance
today_tech.summary: Abstract: The first 72 hours of a missing-child investigation are critical for successful recovery.
